economic_notes: Operates gaming, fisheries, tobacco retail, rental properties, wind energy partnership (51% Truro Millbrook Wind LP), hotel partnership (97% We'Kopekwitk Service Hotel LP), aquaculture, and various commercial operations. Hotel LP had COVID-19 payment waivers; payments resumed January 1, 2023.
notes: Audit qualified due to missing budget information on statements of operations and changes in net debt — not a material misstatement of financial position. Prior year (2021) included a one-time $20,348,251 1919 Land Claim Compensation and related $5,820,000 trust expense. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: We'Kopekwitk Service Hotel LP (97%) and Truro Millbrook Wind LP (51%). Millbrook First Nation Children's Trust excluded from consolidation. Statements signed September 28, 2023 — over 18 months after fiscal year end. Current liabilities calculated as line of credit ($0) + accounts payable ($7,643,461) + term loans due on demand ($360,988) = $8,004,449. Total government transfers include ISC ($25,567,053) + METIS ($1,357,821) + CMHC ($386,376) + additional government funding ($722,617) = $28,033,867.
